ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the service */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user has a premium account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "plot_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie's plot */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the movie's poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the movie's trailer */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie for external references */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie based on user interactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "rating_mean" REAL /* Mean rating of the movie */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rating has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the movie to their watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie in the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the watchlist entry has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the movie as favorite */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie marked as favorite */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was marked as a favorite */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the favorite entry has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review has been deleted */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Comedy, Drama) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)
